name: Traceable AI API Security API
what_it_does: Traceable AI API Security REST API for distributed tracing-based API security and observability platform. Enables AI agents to manage API discovery and inventory using distributed tracing (Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), handle API threat detection based on user and API behavior baselines, access sensitive data flow tracking across API transactions, retrieve API attack detection using ML-based anomaly detection, manage API risk scoring and vulnerability assessment automation, handle user entity and behavior analytics (UEBA) for API context, access distributed trace correlation for security event investigation, retrieve API testing and fuzz testing integration data, manage policy-based API access control enforcement, and integrate API security telemetry with SIEM, SOAR, and DevSecOps platforms.
use_cases: Discovering APIs via distributed traces from API governance agents
Detecting anomalous API behavior from security monitoring agents
Tracking sensitive data flows from data protection agents
Integrating API security events with SIEM from security operations agents
not_for: Traditional perimeter security without API behavior analytics
Consumer applications without enterprise API security needs
best_when: An enterprise using Traceable AI wants AI agents to automate API discovery via distributed tracing, behavioral threat detection, sensitive data flow tracking, ML-based anomaly detection, and SIEM/SOAR integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: ML-based anomaly detection requires baseline training period — automation during ramp-up will have higher false positive rates. Distributed trace-based discovery only captures instrumented API calls; uninstrumented APIs are invisible. Automated enforcement requires fine-tuned baselines.

auth.notes: Traceable uses API key authentication. Per-tenant access. Webhooks for security alert notifications. REST API documentation at docs.traceable.ai. OpenTelemetry-based agent for distributed trace collection. Jaeger integration for existing tracing infrastructure. SIEM and SOAR integrations available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; API traffic volume determines pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2020 (Harshil Parikh, ex-Unison). Private ($110M+ funding). API security with distributed tracing differentiator. 100+ enterprise customers. Harness acquisition rumors. OpenTelemetry-native approach. Strong cloud-native and microservices architectures. Competes with Salt Security and Noname for API security market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; trace data volume managed separately

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: ML baseline requires learning period; automated enforcement during first 2-4 weeks has high false positive rate
Distributed tracing dependency — Traceable requires OpenTelemetry or Jaeger instrumentation; uninstrumented services are blind spots
Trace coverage requirement — full API security value requires instrumentation of all services; partial coverage creates blind spots
Behavioral baseline sensitivity — automation should monitor baseline drift alerts before acting on detected anomalies
Sensitive data classification — Traceable auto-classifies sensitive data in traces; verify classification accuracy before compliance reporting
Harness acquisition rumors — verify current ownership and roadmap before long-term investment in integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: API security with tracing. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. US. API behavior, trace, and threat data.

security_score_components.security_notes: API security. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. US. API behavior and security threat data.
